SEARCH
Module overrungl.opengl
Package overrungl.opengl

Interface GL12C

All Superinterfaces:
overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
All Known Subinterfaces:
GL, GLLegacy
public interface GL12C extends overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
The OpenGL 1.2 forward compatible functions.
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233
